title: Mercy and Albino Wedding Photo with their Parents
description: A photo taken during Mercy and Albino Verdadero's wedding with their parents on both side. From the left, there's Rosita Pachico, Mercy Verdadero's mother. Then, the second lady is Onesima Verdadero, Albino Verdadero's mother. The woman and the man in the middle are Mercy and Albino Verdadero. Next to Albino Verdadero are their fathers. The first one is Alberto Pachico and the last one is Renato Verdadero.
